<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create a D585 passive strict-DATA store frame for AgenticMemoryRecord arrays.

The frame is a versioned DTO only. It performs no storage I/O, hydration,
graph restore, commit acknowledgement, admission, or application decision.

## Import

```ts
import { frameAgenticMemoryRecords } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function frameAgenticMemoryRecords(
	records: readonly AgenticMemoryRecord<TJson>[],
	opts: StoreFrameOptions = {},
): AgenticMemoryRecordStoreFrame<TJson>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `records` | `readonly AgenticMemoryRecord<TJson>[]` | AgenticMemory records to frame. |
| `opts` | `StoreFrameOptions` | Optional DATA provenance for the frame. |

## Returns

A versioned strict-DATA record store frame.
